THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COWAN IV, LEE S RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMOS, JUSTIN $1,255.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,285.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT OF THE JUDGMENT IN FULL, THE DEFENDANT AT HIS ELECTION, BUT NOT LATER THAN DECEMBER 30, 2011, MAY OBTAIN CREDITS AGAINST THE JUDGMENT FOR THE VALUE OF ANY OF PLAINTIFF'S LOST ITEMS (IDENTIFIED IN THE COMPLAINT) WHICH ARE RECOVERED TO THE PLAINTIFF.
